_comment: Template for logging a user-placed bet. Copy to a temp file, fill in, then: node test-user-bet-log.js --add <path/to/bet.json>. Omit `id` to auto-generate. Omit `loggedAt` to use now(). `legs[].hit` and `result` are filled by --settle after the game.

legs.note: thesis: bounce-back from G3 13pt bruise game

notes: starter-only, both teams strategy. SAS pulled forward more than the algorithm
